manager_handoff.notes: MT-1: report final-packet + JSON 생성 (pipeline.py, tests/test_verification_json_ssot.py) MT-2: Consistency Guard JSON 기반 재작성 (pipeline.py, tests/test_consistency_guard_json_basis.py) MT-3: gates request-accept verification_json 기록 (pipeline.py, tests/test_acceptance_request_verification_json.py) MT-4: gates accept JSON SHA 검증 추가 (pipeline.py, tests/test_gates_accept_verification_json.py) MT-5: hygiene cleanup-workspace --after-complete (pipeline.py, tests/test_hygiene_cleanup_workspace.py) MT-6: 문서 동기화 (CLAUDE.md, .claude/agents/pm-agent.md, .claude/agents/test-harness-agent.md, RELEASE_NOTES.md)
